data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for scope-based binding.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the 'Scope-based binding (required/recommended/optional)' requirement, but the evidence does not provide any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm or deny this requirement. The linked use case mentions the need for scope-based binding, yet there are no prior steps that demonstrate its implementation or functionality. This lack of evidence leads to an inconclusive status regarding the requirement's coverage.
gaps: No evidence of scope-based binding being implemented or validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence for scope-based binding
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the scope-based binding requirement.
